description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly tapered base and a flat top, featuring a prominent black handle and lever mechanism at the top. The front displays a large white label with the word 'WATER' in bold, along with safety instructions and pictograms, all set against a white background. The surface is visibly worn, with scratches and scuff marks, indicating frequent handling or long-term placement in a public or industrial setting. The base appears darker, possibly due to accumulated grime or a protective coating. No hose or nozzle is visible, suggesting this is a water-based extinguisher with a direct discharge from the top. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, designed for easy recognition and access in emergencies.
description: A worn red water fire extinguisher with a black handle, white instructional label, and a darkened base, showing signs of frequent use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full instructional label, handle, and lever mechanism clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible label, showing the plain red cylindrical body and the top handle from behind.
description_view_2: Front-left angled view, partially revealing the label and the handle, with more of the cylindrical body visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right angled view, showing mostly the red body and the handle from the back, with only a sliver of the label visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white rectangular label on the front with red and green text, pictograms, and safety instructions.
